issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving double tasks across multiple workflows, including post-referral and pre-referral workflows, specifically tied to Loan Simple leads. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which caused leads to qualify for workflow enrollment more than once. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks to avoid double follow-up.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that previously fell out and returned to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: For deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window, manually enroll them in the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly suppressing enrollment or task generation for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters on 2026-03-09 to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any open post-referral tasks on deals currently marked Closed Lost or Transferred that received tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails referencing wrong loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated LO. The issue was identified as a product-side problem affecting how LO data was pulled into email templates. Luis resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated LO information.

issues.title: MRC and other Offer Accepted deals not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: Deals updated to Offer Accepted — particularly MRC deals with no lender assigned — were not triggering the TC workflow or generating tasks. HubSpot support was engaged and identified the issue. The fix was confirmed on 2026-04-01 after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC or lender-less deals that were updated to Offer Accepted between approximately mid-February and April 1 into the TC workflow to generate the required closing tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral accepted on March 18th
issues.desc: A referral accepted on March 18th did not generate any post-referral workflow tasks for the HA. The root cause was identified as an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow filter from evaluating correctly. The issue was escalated to the product team for resolution.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any referrals accepted around March 18th that did not receive post-referral tasks into the workflow, or manually create the required follow-up tasks.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying the buyer of their credit amount was firing at the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in a message with no dollar amount. The SMS should only send at the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is calculable. It was confirmed to be a dashboard-triggered communication and was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: For buyers who received the incomplete credit SMS during the impact window, manually send a follow-up SMS or email at the Sale Pending stage with the correct credit amount once closing information is submitted.
